Table '1000000001 1' 3-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 (300 in chips)
Seat 2: TestHero (300 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 (300 in chips)
TestHero: posts small blind 10
Villain2: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to TestHero [Qs 4d]
Villain1: folds
TestHero: raises 280 to 300 and is all-in
Villain2: calls 280 and is all-in
*** FLOP *** [9c 6s Kh]
*** TURN *** [9c 6s Kh] [4s]
*** RIVER *** [9c 6s Kh 4s] [Js]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
TestHero: shows [Qs 4d] (a pair of Fours)
Villain2: shows [4c Ah] (a pair of Fours - Ace kicker)
Villain2 collected 600 from pot
TestHero finished the tournament in 3rd place
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 600 | Rake 0
Board [9c 6s Kh 4s Js]
Seat 1: Villain1 (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: TestHero (small blind) showed [Qs 4d] and lost with a pair of Fours
Seat 3: Villain2 (big blind) showed [4c Ah] and won (600) with a pair of Fours
